items.title: Stifel Raises PT on McDonald’s (MCD) Stock
items.description: McDonald’s Corporation (NYSE:MCD) is one of the Best Consumer Cyclical Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. On August 22, Stifel analyst Chris O’Cull lifted the price target on the company’s stock to $315 from $300, while keeping a “Hold” rating. As per the analyst, assessing the impact of McDonald’s Corporation (NYSE:MCD) reportedly agreeing with franchisees to […]

items.title: Fast food used to be a cheap meal option. Why has that changed?
items.description: What's been happening in the fast-food landscape that it has become harder to feed a family as a cheap meal?

items.title: McDonald's And Microsoft Among 12 Companies To Announce Annual Increases In September
items.description: August saw strong dividend growth, but September will likely bring modest hikes from long-time growers like Altria, Dover, and AWR. See why streaks will continue.

items.title: 3 Standout Themes That Emerged From Earnings Season
items.author: Geoffrey Seiler
items.description: The second-quarter earnings season revealed three major themes: continued AI investment by tech giants, shifting dynamics in the restaurant industry, and growing economic pressure from tariffs across multiple sectors.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Strong AI-driven growth across cloud computing, Azure, and enterprise software with accelerating Microsoft 365 Copilot app adoption
Standout performer in semiconductor space, benefiting from robust AI infrastructure spending
Experienced a surprising 4.0% decline in same-store sales, indicating consumer spending challenges
Strong U.S. same-store sales growth of 2.5% by leveraging value offerings during economic pressures
Absorbed significant tariff costs but remains confident in mitigation strategies
